headline: Champion Cancer Care Across Canada
subheadline: Your monthly gift — no matter the size — brings comfort, treatment, and hope to cancer patients and their families.

updates.title: Medication Fund Reaches $50,000
updates.body: Thanks to monthly donors like you, our medication assistance fund has reached $50,000 — covering treatment costs for patients who cannot afford them on their own.

updates.title: New Comfort Care Kits Delivered
updates.body: Over 400 comfort care kits were delivered to cancer wards across three provinces, including blankets, toiletries, and activity books for long-stay patients.

updates.title: Welcome, Charity Champions!
updates.body: Every dollar you give is tracked and reported. We believe in full transparency — you will always know exactly how your donations are helping cancer patients across Canada.
